description_long: This object depicts a stylized natural waterfall cascading down a steep, dark rock face into a shallow pool below. The water is rendered in a bright blue, with the waterfall forming a vertical sheet that splashes into the pool, surrounded by scattered rocks. Several low-poly evergreen trees with conical green foliage and brown trunks are positioned around the pool and on the rocky terrain, adding a forested atmosphere. The terrain is irregular and angular, with black and dark gray surfaces representing rocky outcrops and ground. The pool at the base of the waterfall is bordered by rocks and trees, creating a secluded, scenic area. The overall scene suggests a tranquil, forested water feature that could be found in a park or natural reserve within an urban environment.
description: A stylized waterfall flows down a dark rocky cliff into a blue pool, surrounded by evergreen trees and scattered rocks, evoking a tranquil forest scene.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full waterfall, the pool, and several trees on both sides, with rocks scattered around the water.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the pool and the dense grouping of trees on the right, with the waterfall visible in profile.
description_view_2: The rear view mostly shows the back of the rocky terrain, with only a few tree tops and rocks visible, and the waterfall itself obscured.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the waterfall in profile, the pool, and a cluster of trees on the left, with rocks and terrain details visible.
